zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell於大約1550年出生在英國。她於大約1570年與Roger Buswell在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年3月在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯享年64歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell于大约1550年出生在英国。她于大约1570年与Roger Buswell在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1613年3月在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯享年64岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Buswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Boswell
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell was born about 1550, in England. She married Roger Buswell about 1570, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died in March 1613, in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswellは約1550年にイギリスで生まれた。約1570年にイギリスでRoger Buswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年3月にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハスバンズ ボスウオルスで64歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハスバンズ ボスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell(은)는 대략 1550년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1570년 영국에서 Roger Buswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 3월 영국 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Roger Buswell aproximadamente 1570, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1613, em Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell родилась около 1550 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Buswell около 1570 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла марта 1613 г. в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margaret Buswell nació aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Roger Buswell aproximadamente 1570, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas.
